title: pelargonium × acidum
intro: Pelargonium × acidum, also known as the Cape Rose Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the geranium family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × acidum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and provide relief from digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
